summary: New `schedules apply` and `schedules diff` subcommands (internal/cli/schedules_gitops.go): terraform-style declarative schedule management. Reads a YAML schedule file, lists live Apify schedules, computes a create/update/delete plan, and applies creates. Updates/deletes are surfaced as deferred actions in v1 (recreate to update; use the generated `schedules delete` to remove). Registered as children of the generated `schedules` command.
rationale: Apify offers dashboard editing + raw API but no GitOps story; YAML in git makes schedules auditable.
